text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking past a cafe when I spot some students
having a conversation.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so it says... whoever chose blue is "calm,
patient, and strong-willed"!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see! Hehe. Color fortune-telling is truly
fascinating.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay, next! Mi turno! And there's only one
choice for me! Of course—without a
doubt—inevitably! It's gotta be red!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Why, you ask?! Because red is the color of my
mask! And this mask gives me courage—you could
even say it represents my own truest self!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Red, huh? Let's see...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What's it say?! That I'm the strongest?
Unbeatable? La numero uno?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Hm... It says you're "aggressive and
oblivious to your surroundings."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Aggressive and oblivious... What's up with
that?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
B-but this is all just fortune-telling, you know?! I
don't really think you're—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
How could I have known... that my mask had such
a villanous side?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Actually... I think I'm beginning to feel it... The darkness!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...
"El"? Do not address me like we are amigas!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
To you, I am El Emperador Infierno! Risen from
the fiery depths below!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! What's going on? Why does El seem so
evil all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
GRRRRR! I am a lawless battler! And I will crush all
who displease me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, slow down. What about the color yellow?
That's in your mask too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Listen. For yellow, it says, "You are a unique
person with a bright and exuberant
personality." ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...You expectin' me to take that seriously?! I'll be
the one tellin' the jokes 'round here, pal!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but your mask has black parts, too! For
black, it says you're "noble and full of
confidence"! That sounds kinda like King!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Mwahaha! I am first-rate! An entertainer! Evil in
its most diabolical form! Now, prepare to burn in
la fuego eterno!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! All the personalities are getting mixed up!
What do we do, Grass?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Part of me wants to watch this play out,
buuut...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, could you tell us who gave you that mask, and
perhaps what they were feeling in that moment?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... It... it was... my papa! He said that... he
wanted me to be brave!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Then... I imagine that no matter what these color
fortunes say, the true meaning of your mask
remains the same.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...!
Hrngh... Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wha?! No... Wh-what have I done?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! El's back to her normal self!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I was so quick to forget the true significado
of my mask. I still have so much to learn...
choice_data_list: But you never lost the heart of an entertainer.
Maybe you need to find even greater strength.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's right! One minute you were a wrestler, then you were a performer, and then you were King! You were so entertaining!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you're consistent in your efforts to
bring joy to others.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Even when I lost sight of myself, my
mask continued to bring me courage!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! As long as I have this mask, I will remain
invicto! All-powerful! In supreeeme condition!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, whaddya know? Appreciate the
affirmation, pal. Feels real nice to—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Noooo! My identity is still confuso! My level of
self-discipline really is lacking!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm... For as long as I am wearing this mask, I will
be the strongest! There must never be any doubt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I must discipline myself! I will steel both my body
and soul with some authentic wrestler workouts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After today's events, I'm reminded of how El
Condor Pasa's mask is a true extension of her self.
